Many people are saying this is symbolic and cannot be enforced.  Unfortunately, that's just not true.  Look at what happened to the founder of Telegram.  Some jurisdiction decides you're violating their laws, all you need to do is catch a connecting flight or take a vacation on their soil or a place that will eagerly extradite, and you're a political prisoner.What happens if one of the officers of 4Chan or Gab is on a flight to Paris and the plane is redirected to London?  Well, they're going to prison.  The UK is a police state.
